selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the next untouched deep-archive test parent after the packet-loop contradiction case and the clearest two-step REAL_A1-named run with closure and lineage splits.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the parent into a smaller controller-facing archive packet that preserves replay-versus-name mismatch, missing sequence ledger, hidden event-to-state hash bridges, descending step family under one strategy id, second-step schema-fail residue, and mixed survivor lineage with empty kill bookkeeping.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next sibling once the two-step REAL_A1 contradiction packet is preserved.
Useful later for queued-continuation chain semantics after the resume stub.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent packet already retains the packet lattice, summary/state counters, hash mismatches, strategy/export step deltas, survivor carryover, and contradiction map needed for second-pass refinement, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already preserve the nearby one-step REAL_A1 and packet-identity floors.
